name: Dick Durbin
subject: What we learned from Mueller's testimony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
Special Counsel Robert Mueller testified before the House today and one thing is absolutely clear from his report and testimony: "The Russian government interfered in the 2016 presidential election in sweeping and systematic fashion."
And yesterday, FBI Director Wray stated, "The Russians are absolutely intent on trying to interfere with our elections."
It's clear that we must take action to protect the integrity of our democracy ahead of the 2020 elections, but Majority Leader Mitch McConnell continues to block our attempts to secure our elections.
**[Add your name now: Leader McConnell must act to protect our elections from future foreign interference.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cfb/42ab3cf4/621f1af7/135d7689/1365386391/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-protect-our-elections-now?source=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
There are common-sense steps we can take to secure our elections, like paper ballot trails and post-election audits. We can require campaigns to report any communications they receive from a foreign government.
We have bipartisan support for protective and funding measures that would easily pass if they came to the Senate floor, but Leader McConnell is standing in the way. Instead, he'd rather risk an electoral outcome that doesn't reflect our democratic process than tackle this issue.
**[Join me: add your name now to urge Leader McConnell to bring election protection legislation to a vote.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cfb/42ab3cf4/621f1af7/135d7689/1365386391/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-protect-our-elections-now?source=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Sign the Petition](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cfb/42ab3cf4/621f1af7/135d7689/1365386391/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://durbin.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-protect-our-elections-now?source=em190724&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**

subject: A bad day for the Swamp
body:
It’s hard to understate just how badly today went for Congressional Democrats. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac51034865&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 24, 2019
---
| | |
# **A bad day for the Swamp**

**It’s hard****to understate** just how badly today went for Congressional Democrats. It took a pressure campaign from the left to get former Special Counsel Robert Mueller to agree to testify before Congress in the first place. Now that he has, the reactions to today’s hearing from across the political spectrum were as ruthless as they are revealing.

**Here are a few** of those reflections:
* “**Impeachment is over**. I don’t think Nancy Pelosi is going to stand for her members bringing forth something that is going to obviously lose.” – ABC News’ Terry Moran

* “I think the **Democrats have to be disappointed** that [Mueller] didn’t more vigorously defend his process and the team.” – former Sen. Claire McCaskill (D-MO)

* “Aside from difficult to watch testimony, there has been **no new information** and no elaboration on the 448-page report.” – CNN Commentator Alice Stewart

* “There were also times when it seemed like**[Mueller] was unfamiliar** with parts of the investigation.” – CNN’s Jake Tapper

* “One has to wonder, too, **where Democrats go from here**.” – _Politico’s_ Blake Hounshell

**If Democrats** were looking to make headlines with today’s political theater, they got them. “[This is Painful](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0559963af&e=3ee4985eea),” _Mediaite_ reports in a pundit round-up. “A Sometimes Halting Mueller Parries Questions,” _The Washington Post_ writes. “Democrats And Media Admit: Mueller's Testimony Was A Total Disaster,” _Townhall_ reports.

**They’re right**. After taking 22 months, calling more than 500 witnesses, issuing more than 2,800 subpoenas, and spending more than $30 million in taxpayer money, Congressional Democrats didn’t get the result they were hoping for from the Special Counsel’s report. In response, they spent more than 6 hours today pressuring Mueller to say something different than what his team concluded in their 448-page analysis.

**They came up empty.**

**While Democrats looked foolish,** that isn’t what made today a bad day for the Swamp. It’s a bad day because, once again, Washington put itself first. Americans are sick of partisan theatrics and desperate for our leaders to keep their promises to the voters who sent them here. Instead, Congress spent yet another day arguing about the results of an election that happened more than two and a half years ago.

**In that time** , President Donald J. Trump’s attention has been on the working-class Americans who put their trust in him. There is plenty of work left to be done, but the results so far are encouraging:
* More than 6 _million_ new jobs have been created since Election Day 2016.

* The 3.7 percent unemployment rate remains near its lowest mark in 49 years.

* Unemployment has hit record or near-record low rates for historically marginalized groups including African-Americans, Hispanics, and women.

* U.S. stock markets continue to break record highs.

* Manufacturing job growth soared to a more than two-decade high last year.

**And that’s just the economy**. From criminal justice reform that will make America’s streets safer while giving former inmates a second chance at life, to veterans choice programs that are holding the VA accountable to our nation’s heroes, President Trump is working each day to keep his promises to voters.

**Imagine how incredible** America could be doing if Congressional Democrats joined us?

[“Not buying it: Voter skepticism about Mueller investigation grows, says Politico poll”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=33c92a1f3f&e=3ee4985eea)

**Rep. Kelly Armstrong to Mueller:**[“Federal recusal law exists for a reason.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77c63650b1&e=3ee4985eea)

**Rep. Matt Gaetz:** [What Mueller’s probe left out ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a66ae7a00a&e=3ee4985eea)

Peter, The U.S. immigration system is broken. The government is not managing migration in an efficient or effective manner, and often fails to treat human beings with the dignity and respect we each deserve. One of the greatest qualities of the United States is how this country has provided sanctuary and opportunities for people from around the world. In the process, immigrants have enriched our culture, strengthened our economy, and made America a better place for everyone. Today, we are releasing our new immigration policy! Check it out and if you like it, give it a share!
[Check it out!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/8536200/82752335/-173619199?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYzM5NDljOC1mM2FlLWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y3cO9zSU7AEDuklB_X1faqPJFRPxpZwvZXUsMUkvrRs=)
With everything going on at our southern border and in the news, we wanted to make sure you know where we stood on immigration policy.

Over the next few months, our campaign will be releasing where I stand on the issues. Keep an eye out for more in the coming months!

body:
we launched a movement | |
---

---
| |
#
**Six years ago ****this week****, we officially announced our campaign for U.S. Senate.** I had never been in elected office, but Bonnie and I saw that America was in a moment of crisis. We personally got involved to help change the direction of our country.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=2dfc0f8e89&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **As a political outsider, no one expected us to win the primary, let alone the general election. **As you may remember, I was polling well below the margin of error. With your help we defied the national polls and political pundits.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=1cc4f6053f&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| We struck a nerve and our powerful **message resonated with Georgians across the entire state. **We met so many Georgians who just wanted to make a difference in their communities and leave a better country for their kids and grandkids.
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e047078f3f&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| **TOGETHER, **we launched an outsider movement focused on changing the direction of our country. Thanks to supporters like you, we won a decisive victory, we took back the Senate Majority in 2014, and then we did it again when we put an outsider in the White House in 2016!
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=f826234780&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| Bonnie and I will always be humbled by your continued support. Since the day I came to the Senate, I've focused on one thing:** RESULTS. We've accomplished a lot, but now it's time to finish the job. **

**We know what we're up against in 2020.**

We're up against historic obstructionism. We're up against socialist policies supported by radical Democrats. We're up against a national liberal media that would love to see Georgia turn into California. We're up against Stacey Abrams, outside groups, and hundreds of millions in false attack ads funded by liberal donors around the country.

However, with your continued support, I know we can defy the odds again. **I know we can win in 2020, and finish the job. **

Thank you for everything!

God bless,
David
---
| [DONATE NOW >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=05dd35fd76&e=02cd889ad3 "DONATE NOW >>>")
---
| | | **PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
---
| [ ](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=15ee46a1b3&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| We know we send a lot of emails, but the truth is: We're counting on you. David is an outsider, not a career politician. He got elected because of supporters like you. He's counting on your help to continue delivering results. These emails are critical to keeping you updated on ways you can help David make a difference. Thank you for all that you do!
---

body:
Why won't our Congressman denounce them?
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AooAmgSnGaXWs8El2WDMSlLgYX3bXji1d2qBAA1kwne76qGm6g3LZMUNG6JV3tdSxN0eprLFL9ANvmZQdpdOiYsO01PBvJaBAUXTHwrqJ9m4y-dnklmuKErjMhlNWItXzUYFONJsKljIp1lko_BEEw==&c=URsfHe4RoeoLOneQGbsJyoiaJ8ZLIUSWfKZkCoJulOzYtPjP7uiPpQ==&ch=qihj6eWctAphDqmI8HpignHR5LYPKf4d3_S5QWQvUzoHVOzYQ3CmEw==)
---
| Dear Friend,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar and the other socialist Congresswomen have become the face of the Democratic Party. They have even labeled themselves "The Squad."
---
| AOC, Omar and the rest of The Squad want socialized health care, open borders and a government takeover of our economy, so they can dictate how we live our lives. In fact, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez's top advisor even admitted that was the objective of the $93 trillion Green New Deal. And most of all, they want to impeach President Trump!
If you send me to Washington, I will be the only member from New York City who will stand up to AOC, Omar and the socialists whose agenda is spreading across our city and state. That's why I'm running for Congress. Will you chip in $20, $50, $100 or whatever you can afford to help me fight The Squad?
---
| | | [DONATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AooAmgSnGaXWs8El2WDMSlLgYX3bXji1d2qBAA1kwne76qGm6g3LZIkzIaiOxZ9E_c4OL70Cj985ZDvfS3_8oDbiKV7T8PsaQGftK-m84C7ml2U3wZtyPrdxmNGdsG5ZqwrMOqcCTL60Jnl8FSK5KMXlqjF-gzMJz2FcBnag-nI=&c=URsfHe4RoeoLOneQGbsJyoiaJ8ZLIUSWfKZkCoJulOzYtPjP7uiPpQ==&ch=qihj6eWctAphDqmI8HpignHR5LYPKf4d3_S5QWQvUzoHVOzYQ3CmEw==)
---
| My question for the four members of The Squad: What do you love about America? It's not a trick question. I doubt they have a real answer. But I do. I'm lucky to live in the greatest country in the world. I know that because I'm the daughter of a Cuban refugee and Greek immigrant who left their homelands to pursue opportunity and a better life.
Please help me get to Washington so I can help preserve the American Dream and stop attempts to implement the very same destructive policies my parents and millions of immigrants came here to flee.
---
| Sincerely,

| Nicole Malliotakis

body:

name: Jenn Liu, kamalaharris.org
subject: To be honest
body:
I’ll be honest with you right now: I’m worried.

During the last Democratic debate, Kamala broke through the noise, and the
energy we felt afterward was electric. We rose in the polls nationwide --
including in critical states like Iowa, New Hampshire, and California --
and together we raised $2 million in the 24 hours after the debate.

But our fundraising has slowed down since then -- and I’m worried about
our momentum.

We’ve set a goal of raising $500,000 online before Kamala sets foot on the
debate stage next Wednesday. No matter what happens, we can’t afford to
fall short. Can you add a gift to our
campaign right now to boost our fundraising before we head into the second
debate?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Do-Over Delusion
body:
“No matter how many times Democrats demand a do-over, the results won’t change.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=873ada9f43&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Do-Over Delusion**

“No matter how many times Democrats demand a do-over, the results won’t change.”

_The Washington Times_ editorial board writes that “facing the klieg lights on national TV Wednesday, Mr. Mueller appeared overwhelmed by the moment, unfamiliar with his brief, a figurehead set in place by mischievous hands.” For a less confused account, look at the Special Counsel’s actual 448-page report. “Each copy spells out in black and white the failure to find that Mr. Trump committed a crime.”

House Speaker Nancy Pelosi knows this, and she must be itching “to slam the door on impeachment proceedings,” the editors add. The question is: Will the far left let her?

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=130da6663f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Democrats are, without question, worse off now than they were before former special counsel Robert Mueller gave his five hours of testimony,” Eddie Scarry writes in the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=34679aa3b1&e=3ee4985eea). “Anyone who watched the back-to-back hearings Wednesday got exactly nothing new from Mueller . . . but Democrats thought it wise to drag out this never-ending nightmare.”
---
|
---
| “Manufacturers are promising to upskill nearly 1.2 million workers, a major training commitment that comes as U.S. companies prepare to try to fill millions of open positions over the next decade amid a labor shortage,” Joe Williams reports for [Fox Business](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=023c6ce178&e=3ee4985eea). “We are thrilled to have [the National Association of Manufacturers] make this huge investment into our future and current manufacturers,” Ivanka Trump said.

**Watch live at 3:30 p.m. ET** : [1-year celebration of the Pledge to America’s Workers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17f18a1506&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Republican Rep. John Ratcliffe blasted former Special Counsel Robert Mueller Wednesday for his report” violating a basic principle of justice, Brooke Singman reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bce745dc2e&e=3ee4985eea). When asked, Mueller couldn’t name a single example of when the Justice Department wouldn’t exonerate an investigated person because their innocence couldn’t be proved. “The bedrock principle of our justice system is a presumption of innocence—everyone is entitled to it, including a sitting president,” Rep. Ratcliffe said.
---
|
---
| “House Democrats hoped that Wednesday’s hearings would allow them to highlight their favorite portions of the Mueller report for people who haven’t read it. Democrats didn’t expect this segment of Americans to include the author,” James Freeman writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f4908d872b&e=3ee4985eea). Regarding “a document with which he seemed strangely unfamiliar, former Justice Department Special Counsel Robert Mueller let stand the report’s finding of no Trump-Russia collusion.”
---
|
---
| “Former Special Counsel Robert Mueller’s testimony Wednesday before two House committees confirmed what we already knew: his two-year investigation of Russia’s meddling in our 2016 presidential election was fatally tainted by deep political bias and was in fact designed to harass and derail President Trump,” Jay Sekulow, Chief Counsel of the American Center for Law and Justice, writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3081479cb7&e=3ee4985eea).

**More:** [Voter skepticism about Mueller investigation grows, says Politico poll](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=249990378c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

subject: Impeachment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |

| Hello,

Yesterday, the American people heard directly from Special Counsel Robert Mueller.

And what they heard was the undeniable truth that Russia interfered in our 2016 presidential election, and that President Trump obstructed the investigation into this serious attack.

The Trump campaign welcomed Russian interference, accepted it, lied about it, and used it to their benefit.

And contrary to President Trump's claim, the Special Counsel's report does not exonerate him of obstruction of justice.

Because of the Special Counsel's testimony yesterday and the weeks of continued obstruction from the Trump administration into Congress' investigation, the House of Representatives must begin formal impeachment proceedings against President Trump.

_**[We must stand up for the survival of our democracy. Join me and add your name to call for immediate impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb7/693b8b0a/47241f62/72de85ab/1209490282/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=072519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

I do not come to this decision lightly, but when the facts undeniably demonstrate that the president obstructed justice and is continuing to do so, Congress must act on its constitutional duty.

_**[Sign my petition and urge the House of Representatives to exercise its authority and begin impeachment proceedings immediately against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb7/693b8b0a/47241f62/72de85aa/1209490282/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=072519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Thank you,

Ed

[**Contribute $5 now to help reelect Sean Casten to Congress in 2020.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-casten?refcode=em190725&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Peter,
Conservative Jeanne Ives just announced her challenge to Democratic Congressman Sean Casten in Illinois' 6th District. Yes--the same Jeanne Ives who infamously ran an ad attacking women's reproductive rights, denigrating immigrants, and mocking the LGBTQ+ community.
We worked so hard last year to elect Sean to give a voice to the people of the 6th District and win a Democratic majority in the House. Now, all that is at risk as the Republicans prepare to spend millions of dollars to unseat Sean and install an extreme conservative in his place.
[**Sean was the first Democrat to flip this district in 46 years. But now, it 's up to all of us to defend our progress and make sure Republicans don't flip it back. Chip in $5 now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-casten?refcode=em190725&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Sean is fighting for Illinois and for all of us in Congress, helping break through GOP obstruction and pass the first major bill on climate change out of the House in more than a decade. This is the kind of leadership we need, but it also makes him a top target for Republicans in 2020.
When she unsuccessfully sought the Republican nomination for Governor of Illinois, Ives accepted $2.5 million from a single GOP megadonor, Richard Uihlein. There's no question that Uihlein and other millionaires will join the special interests and bankroll Ives' 2020 campaign, putting all of our progress and our newly-won Democratic majority in the House at risk.
[**We can 't let the GOP win, Peter. Contribute $5 to Sean now.**](http://action.dickdurbin.?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-casten?refcode=em190725&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
My best,
Dick Durbin

How well our movement does depends directly on the investments we make right now -- and those investments only come from grassroots donors. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e96a/45c30650/147bb0e55/669ee546/3390131293/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

2020 is going to determine the direction our country goes in for generations to come. It's when we decide: Is America going to work better and better for the wealthy and well-connected, or are we finally going to turn things around for working families?

That's why I'm in this fight. But I can't do it alone.

**How well our movement does depends directly on the investments we make right now -- and those investments only come from grassroots donors.**

We invest now by traveling to 24 states and counting. We invest now by talking with as many people as possible -- from selfie lines to house parties to knocking on doors. And we invest now by hitting every monthly goal, because that's the only way we fund a grassroots movement.

**From: **The Cow
**Date:** Tues, Mar. 26th at 5:34 P.M.
**Subject:** A Message from The Cow
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
Dear friends and farmers,
The Cow here! Or **@Devincow** for those of you on Twitter. I'm taking a break from grazing the Iowa pastures to send you an update on the $250 million lawsuit Devin Nunes filed against Twitter because of my jokes.
**Devin Nunes might not be a-moo-sed that I have more followers than he does, but I happen to think that his blind loyalty to Trump is udder-ly ridiculous.**
Thankfully, the Voter Protection Project has offered to step up and defend me -- and our 1st Amendment -- against Nunes' bullying, frivolous lawsuit. If Nunes's lawsuit is successful, the Voter Protection Project has offered to fund our legal defense!
And if the moo-ney isn't used (that's the hope!) -- all your hard earned cheddar goes directly to defeating Nunes in 2020!

name: Gary Peters
subject: I want to be frank
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
We need to be frank about the rhetoric coming from the Republican party led by Donald Trump: It is unapologetically racist.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6dacab/5721a3ed/731593cb/ef9bbf9/1610705808/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends,

I've never been interested in scoring political points or being center stage on cable news. I came to Washington to get things done for Michiganders, and oftentimes, that means working with my colleagues on the other side of the aisle.

But we need to be frank about the rhetoric coming from the Republican Party led by Donald Trump: It is unapologetically racist. Period. Beyond that, it's dangerous and in complete opposition to the ideals of our nation.

Here's the thing about rhetoric, friends - it often falls in line with a person's actions. So it gives me serious pause when President Trump toes a line that's contrary to who we are as a country. It raises even more questions about what happened on his campaign and what's happening in the Oval Office.

That's why it's so important we heard from Special Counsel Robert Mueller. For the sake of our nation's elections and democracy, we need to follow the facts wherever they lead.

**We need to show that the American people will fight for truth and democracy - which is why I'm reaching out to you now. You can help by answering the survey before midnight. I want to know: **
**Do you think Donald Trump has been honest with Americans?**

Gary

| Hello - Ed Markey is calling for immediate impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump, and we need to show massive grassroots support for holding Trump accountable.

_**[Join Ed and sign the petition to call on the House of Representatives to begin impeachment proceedings immediately against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb6/693b8b0a/473dcbe6/72de85b2/1235589224/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=072519_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Begin Forward from Ed Markey:
* * *
Hello,

Yesterday, the American people heard directly from Special Counsel Robert Mueller.

And what they heard was the undeniable truth that Russia interfered in our 2016 presidential election, and that President Trump obstructed the investigation into this serious attack.

The Trump campaign welcomed Russian interference, accepted it, lied about it, and used it to their benefit.

And contrary to President Trump's claim, the Special Counsel's report does not exonerate him of obstruction of justice.

Because of the Special Counsel's testimony yesterday and the weeks of continued obstruction from the Trump administration into Congress' investigation, the House of Representatives must begin formal impeachment proceedings against President Trump.

_**[We must stand up for the survival of our democracy. Join me and add your name to call for immediate impeachment proceedings against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb6/693b8b0a/473dcbe6/72de85b2/1235589224/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=072519_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

I do not come to this decision lightly, but when the facts undeniably demonstrate that the president obstructed justice and is continuing to do so, Congress must act on its constitutional duty.

_**[Sign my petition and urge the House of Representatives to exercise its authority and begin impeachment proceedings immediately against Donald Trump.](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1ddb6/693b8b0a/473dcbe6/72de85b1/1235589224/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-impeachment?source=072519_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=")**_

Thank you,

Ed

Robert Mueller sounded the alarm yesterday, testifying that Russia is working to undermine the 2020 elections "as we sit here." After the Mueller hearing, Mark took to the Senate floor to try and pass
|

| | **" GOP BLOCKS ELECTION SECURITY BILLS
AFTER MUELLER TESTIMONY"**
\-- _The Hill_

[**Help Mark keep fighting to protect our democracy >>**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d1c9/53d9897e/51576ead/1c8e7670/1629116208/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-elecsecrr?refcode=20190725nd__150__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") Derek,

Robert Mueller sounded the alarm yesterday, testifying that Russia is working to undermine the 2020 elections "as we sit here." After the Mueller hearing, Mark took to the Senate floor to try and pass the _FIRE Act_ to protect our democracy. **But with zero explanation, Senate Republicans blocked the bill!**

The _FIRE Act_ says that if a foreign power reaches out to your presidential campaign and tries to interfere in the election, you have to report it to the FBI. **Protecting our elections _should_ be a bipartisan issue** \-- but as with so many other important bills, Mitch McConnell is standing in the way.

It's exactly why we need to flip the Senate in 2020. And if that's going to happen, Mark _must_ win re-election. **Scott Taylor has made it clear he 'll toe the Trump-McConnell party line.** And while Mark was working to secure our elections yesterday, Taylor spent the day on Twitter attacking Mark's work and complaining that President Trump was being "unfairly persecuted."

**That's why we need your help today. Mark only won by less than one percentage point in 2014, and with Donald Trump 's re-election headquarters now open in Virginia, we can't get complacent. name: Team Beshear
subject: Let Andy and Jacqueline know which issues are most important to you >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We're now two months into the general election, and Andy and Jacqueline are busy traveling all over Kentucky to talk to folks about the issues that are most important to them.
|
---

| | | **Beshear for Kentucky
General Election Issues Survey**

Number of Questions: 10
Time to Complete: 5 Minutes
Responses Needed: 2,500 | | **[BEGIN SURVEY](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b21/ad6dc73/154e4087/db405ab/3922360852/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/C6S35DN")**
---
Peter,

We're now **two months into the general election** , and Andy and Jacqueline are busy traveling all over Kentucky to talk to folks about the issues that are most important to them.

They're hearing a lot about Kentuckians' struggles to access affordable **health care** , the need to invest in our public schools and support our teachers, and lagging **job and wage growth** under Matt Bevin's administration.

subject: While the left feuded, President Trump helped 12 million workers change their lives
body:
While Congressional Democrats spent the past year determined to undo the 2016 election... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c328a28c53&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 25, 2019
---
| | |
# **While the left feuded, President Trump helped 12 million workers change their lives**

**While Congressional Democrats** spent the past year determined to undo the 2016 election—topped off by [yesterday’s “spectacle”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=687a4187b2&e=3ee4985eea) with Special Counsel Robert Mueller—President Donald J. Trump has kept one of his most important promises to voters.

**Alongside other crucial** **actions** such as signing historic criminal justice reform and dealing a major blow to [America’s opioid crisis](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42d1c2bd04&e=3ee4985eea), President Trump joined with leaders across the private and nonprofit sectors to accomplish something extraordinary. With Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump leading the charge, the Pledge to America’s Workers secured more than _12.7 million_ opportunities for our workforce in just one year.

** Watch: **[Ivanka Trump – “12 Million American lives improved!” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b829210c8&e=3ee4985eea)

**The Pledge** is President Trump’s commitment to making sure the booming Trump Economy benefits every American worker. As the number of job openings soars and the unemployment rate plummets to a near-50-year low, American wages are starting to rise. But that great news comes with a distinct challenge, as U.S. companies struggle to find enough workers with the right skill sets to fill all these open jobs.

**That’s where** the Pledge to America’s Workers comes in.

**Last summer** , President Trump introduced a new approach to bring more Americans off the sidelines and back into the labor force. He issued a challenge for businesses to create more career training opportunities for students and workers of all ages. To celebrate the one-year anniversary of that effort, the President invited the leaders of some of those companies—and the workers who have seen their lives change—to the White House today.

**“Over the last year,** more than 300 businesses and organizations, large and small, have signed our Pledge to America’s Workers, and today we celebrate reaching **over 12 million pledges** ,” Ivanka Trump said.

**Gathered** **in the State Dining Room** of the White House earlier, the National Association of Manufacturers announced they will become the latest organization to meet the President’s challenge. With members that include American manufacturing giants such as Caterpillar and Boeing, more than 1.1 million blue-collar workers will have a chance to enhance their skills under NAM’s new pledge.

**“Every single pledge** is a commitment to the promise of an individual and his or her potential. We are changing the conversation on workforce development, so we can prepare for the jobs of today and tomorrow,” Ms. Trump said.

[Thanks to President Trump, 12+ million commitments and counting!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=891ea5412b&e=3ee4985eea)

**More:** [US manufacturers pledge to train 1.2M workers amid skilled labor shortage](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2da89de93c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: REAL results for the American people**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc7bdea060&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **House Democrats** squandered more time that could have been spent helping the American people yesterday on what seems to be their only agenda item: never-ending obstruction and investigation. But like Charlie Brown missing the football, Democrat leaders keep doing the same thing over and over—with the same failed results.

**But****President Trump** remains hard at work, delivering on the issues Americans actually care about: jobs, higher wages, border security, lower drug prices, a stronger military, and more. It’s been two and a half years of real results, and there’s much more to come.

** By the numbers: **[Zero collusion. Zero obstruction. $35 million taxpayer dollars.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d797827b8a&e=3ee4985eea)

#

_You are receiving this email because you have previously supported Democratic leaders in Washington. To learn more about how Patty Murray is fighting for our families as the senior senator from Washington,[**click here**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b4/22080b68/7e408021/4602e492/2054799203/VEsH/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://pattymurray.com/"). To unsubscribe from future emails, [**click here**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b4/22080b68/7e408021/4602e491/2054799203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")._
[**There is no reason that quality, affordable child care shouldn 't be within reach for every family. Sign on now to show your support for the Child Care for Working Families Act.**](http://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a6935b4/22080b68/7e408021/4602e490/2054799203/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6Ijk4MjA4IiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiIifQ==/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://murraysenate.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/child-care-for-all-iws?source=em190725&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=")
Team,
The lack of affordable, quality child care is a national crisis, not only impacting working parents, but our entire economy. Parents who are lucky enough to find high-quality child care are struggling to afford it, and many parents are forced to wait months or years on long waiting lists. Teachers and child care workers can't make ends meet on their unlivable wages. And children are missing out on vital early learning and development opportunities.
That's why I introduced the Child Care for Working Families Act to help address this crisis. Our bill would ensure every working family can find and afford child care, expand access to quality preschool options, and guarantee that teachers and providers are paid at least a living wage so that they can provide for themselves and their own families.
